## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content performance, link building, and upcoming content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance for Growth Center doubled clicks in the second week](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [7 backlinks acquired from various domains through link building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [New Figma templates available for featured images on the website](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Plans to create statistics-based articles for link building and SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Clicks doubled for Growth Center content in the second week](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [All content has been indexed successfully](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - ["LLM for marketing" article performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Some articles already ranking on page one (average position metric)](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate SEMrush data for more comprehensive keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [7 backlinks acquired from various domains](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Currently using accounts within their network (e.g., attention.com)](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Discussion on cost-effectiveness of current link building strategy ($9,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Consideration of alternative link building services for comparison](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Featured Images and Website Update

  - [New Figma templates available for featured images](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Templates are editable and will fit into the new website design](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [New website expected to be ready in April](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Working on automating reporting using Google's Looker Studio](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Possibility of using Google Sheets as a data landing zone for flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Statistics-Based Article Strategy

  - [Proposal to create statistics-focused articles for improved link building](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Challenges with AI-generated statistics content noted](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Suggestion to use deep research and actual studies for accurate data](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Potential to sacrifice a few regular articles to produce high-value statistics content](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Keyword Analysis and Content Planning

  - [Evan shared list of \~300 existing ranking terms from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Request for Aida to compare with current keyword targets in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Aim to identify novel keywords for future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/AWff1-HrREksSh7cSy7_JAcnZNzEuJK9?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
